productDisplayName: Denizen Men Rust & Black Check Shirt
description: Style Note denizen's new range of casual shirts inject an effortlessly stylish aesthetic into your off-duty wardrobe with their classic cuts and vintage themed prints. This shirt is a versatile addition to your off-duty ensemble as it can be worn with jeans for a chilled out look or with chinos for a sharper look. Product Details Rust and black check shirt, has a spread collar, full buttoned placket, front and back yoke, patch pocket on the left chest with buttoned closure, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, mid arm buttoned tab to roll up the sleeves and a curved hemline Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold Tumble dry low Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
